title: Application - Fresh install mobile application
scenario: Verify fresh installation of the mobile app from the Play Store/App Store and successful onboarding start.
steps: Uninstall the mobile app from the device.
Go to the Play Store (Android) or App Store (iOS).
Search for and select the Lens mobile app.
Verify the app is installed successfully and the user can start the onboarding process.
expected: The app is installed successfully and the user can start the onboarding process.
